title: Dental Office Receptionist
description: Inbound AI receptionist for a dental office that checks availability, books, looks up, and cancels appointments through function calls. Uses Deepgram's unified Voice Agent API and Twilio Media Streams, with one-command Fly.io deploy.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: List open appointment slots for a date range

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Create an appointment for a named patient

tools.name: lookup_appointment
tools.description: Find an existing appointment by patient details

tools.name: cancel_appointment
tools.description: Cancel an existing appointment by id

notes: Source actually uses Deepgram Flux (flux-general-en) for STT — not yet on the allowed list, so mapped to Deepgram Nova-3. The Voice Agent API bundles STT+LLM+TTS into a single WebSocket; LLM is represented separately as GPT-4o, the default 'think' provider in the example settings.
